title: Givotia moluccana
taxonomy: Givotia moluccana is classified under the family Arecaceae and the genus Givotia, which is a monotypic genus, meaning it contains only one species. The genus Givotia is a part of the palm family, Arecaceae. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its palm-like leaves and stem structure. The species Givotia moluccana is native to the Maluku Islands in Indonesia. Its classification is also supported by molecular phylogenetic studies that have confirmed its membership in the palm family.
